description_long: This is a military-style ammunition box constructed from dark green painted metal, featuring a rectangular, robust form with a hinged lid. The lid is secured with a prominent latch and is adorned with several rifle cartridges resting on top, suggesting its use for storing ammunition. Bold yellow stenciled text is visible on the side, indicating the box contains 200 cartridges of 7.62mm NATO rounds for AK47 rifles, along with a lot number. The box has reinforced edges and a flat top, providing durability and stackability. The overall finish is matte, with slight sheen from the metal surface, and the box appears to be tightly sealed to protect its contents from the elements. The utilitarian design and markings make it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban storage settings.
description: A dark green metal ammunition box with yellow stenciled text and several rifle cartridges on its lid, featuring a robust, utilitarian design and a secure latch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow stenciled labeling and several cartridges resting on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the box's rectangular profile and the latch mechanism, with cartridges visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view with the yellow text partially visible and the lid's hinge structure apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hinge details and cartridges on the lid, with no visible labeling.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding steel handle on the lid, rectangular in shape, fixed to pivot for carrying, with no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Steel clasp latch on the front, lever-type, designed for secure closure; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, no visible trays, drawers, or dividers; standard for ammunition boxes.
attribute_external_labeling: Yellow stenciled text on the side: '200 CARTRIDGES 7.62 MM, NATO O M82 CARTONS, AK47, M13 LC-85F291-429A11'
